scripts.check:model-catalog: node -e "const {existsSync}=require('node:fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const root=existsSync('../scripts/sync-model-catalog.mjs')?'..':'.'; const script='scripts/sync-model-catalog.mjs'; if(!existsSync(root+'/'+script)){console.warn('[model-catalog] skip check: script not found at '+root+'/'+script); process.exit(0);} const result=spawnSync(process.execPath,[script,'--check'],{stdio:'inherit',cwd:root}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.dev: npm run check:model-catalog && tsx watch src/index.ts
